# prek for the `hooks` CI job (.github/workflows/ci.yml), hash-pinned from
# PyPI. Wheel hashes only — no sdist hash — so pip installed with
# --require-hashes --no-deps can never fall back to building from source.
# Linux wheels cover current ubuntu runners; mac/win included so a runner
# change doesn't break the pin. Dependabot (pip, /.github) bumps this.
prek==0.4.8 \
    --hash=sha256:1f8f8cdc65836b571824c965daebb81b449f7e4a43894c58621f5708d5a185ed \
    --hash=sha256:bce1798e96d9e3a6e6abf435da7107e81452f69edb3ca7c6f90a457355ea46e2 \
    --hash=sha256:ab3a52db17254d701c3cebb7eea58c8230aa7c1959aacfd5b5f25de18edb15d1 \
    --hash=sha256:b3fcfd620523bbc3f51a21d7cd63449f659b9e2cf3582de12dd5949e23227b8f \
    --hash=sha256:42e65bc8425e9d7f1691a13ca1da2e07807d1ba76c35740833354b945131689e \
    --hash=sha256:f578492a8e0c9bc6b4bf6dfbba8716f647d4cd0769bf10ad6cf336e3096fd392 \
    --hash=sha256:d4335f9d5beb123a3884a7fe34f57c9f0828f4fbb7666beab4298833459b104f \
    --hash=sha256:18a8747df9c602e052881d3efb14dd7f7d62a59bd7277ae5171c9e7661d59d84 \
    --hash=sha256:4db639db481d5f854eff9b3d2108889e613b8c15868bcf6bdd777c7cee577436 \
    --hash=sha256:c3890a6f92316d2cf44eb50584e8d2b23a596dd70487022e61186a71a2ac0900 \
